小弟英文麻麻 只係平時開工時有睇慣下英文 有translate 錯請更正

你點樣受到香港示威影響?
我地希望聽到來自香港既讀者們講關於你地今次示威睇到既情況

成千上萬既示威者逼到政客放棄討論今次呢個有爭議既送中法案
(可能佢地唔知其實班仆街係表決)

示威者包圍立法會同領據左市中心(金鐘) 警察發出警告會準備使用武力 示威者佢地自行分發同戴上面具保鮮紙 去同防暴警察對抗 以保護免受到胡椒噴霧既傷害

分享你既經驗
你對呢種情況有咩睇法? 你有無參與過示威? 如果你有參與其中 你可以透過下邊既加密表格匿名聯繫我地 只有衛報可以睇到你所講既內容 我地唔會係未經你同意下就會POST你任何內容 我地其中一位記者可能會同你聯繫及了解

Extradition law will affect all kind of people in Hong Kong, especially to people who are against China and in for freedom. In short, if china gov suspects anyone who offences China Law, by employing such extradition law, they can request HK GOV to arrest and extradite them to China. As known by the w
orld, there are no real law in China, they do whatever they want. Such law basically allows CHINA to extradite HK people to "death" at their will. It applies to people even with different nationalities, American, British etc. On 9 of June, over million of people protested against the law. However, HK GOV has no intention to cancel the extradition law and clearly stated that legislation will go on, ignoring people's voices. Legislative Council are controlled by pro-chinese/pro communist party councilors as they are not elected by people. This makes us, as HK citizens, no choice but to gear up to stop the legislation. All I can see is that police shots tear gas to crowd even they are retreating, shots tear gas to crowd even they are unarmed and did nothing. Open fire with non-metallic bullet without any warning. Those shootings are not aim to force protesters to retreat, those shooting are AIM TO KILL, as I can see multiple HEAD-SHOT. Photo links attach:
1. https://imgur.com/a/WHevdru
2. https://i.lihkg.com/540/https://na.cx/i/MWwzeX2.png
3. https://i.lihkg.com/540/https://na.cx/i/y9qkaWk.gif
4. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nENNDrA_ePo
5. https://i.lihkg.com/540/https://na.cx/i/NxEMPS3.jpg
One of the injuries is press as he is working for RTHK

Even protesters are down, police went rampage and attack protesters. (please refer to
1. https://www.facebook.com/story.phpstory_fbid=356899408354598&id=127745917936616
2. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WJmXvCKKT1o

HK police are killing, with no regulations. HK GOV is working for China, to wipe out any voices. The fight is still going on. By the time I finish this writing, police seems ready for another assault.

幫手改 轉發

Extradition Bill 逃犯條例
Legislative Council 立法會
Central Government Complex 政府總部
Crowd control barrier 鐵馬
Water-Safety Barriers 水馬
Legislator 議員
President of the Legislative Council 立法會主席
Riot 暴動
fugitives 逃犯
democracy 民主
pepper spray 胡椒噴霧
water cannon 水炮
Tear gas 催淚彈
Occupy movement 佔中運動
Jurisdictions 司法管轄區
chief executive 行政長官
student union 學生會
boycott classes 罷課
singing hymns 唱聖詩
stop and search 搜身
Abuse of power 濫權
Loopholes 漏洞
Carrie Lam 食屎狗

replies.msg: 其他人自己改 加加減減  我交左

I feel very upset upon the HK government right now. How can they turn a blind eye to the million of Hongkongers' disagreement toward extradition to China?

Once the extradition bill is pass, it would be a disaster of Hong Kong. It will seriously threat our basic human right. As a matter of fact, the legal system of China is full of corruption, how can we trust it and expect everyone can have a fair trail under it?

Worse still, the foreign investment would also reduce obviously due to the China extradition. It will adversely affect the economy of Hongkong. Under such a massive reduction in Hongkong economy, no one can be innocent.

All in all, if the extradition bill is pass, it will pose a great threat to Hongkong and all of the Hongkongers living in it. As a Hongkongers, we born there, we live there, we love there, why we have to sacrifice the future of Hongkong for the accomplishment of their political mission?

We just have no way to protect our beloved place and our future. So, please, let our sounds be heard and so that we can have a chance to save our beloved Hongkong.
